top_signals.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Is Hindsight 20/20? Hormuz Oil Shock and Lessons Learned from 1973
top_signals.summary: While oil and gas are once again flowing through the Strait of Hormuz, the closure of the vital waterway for over 100 days could prove to be a turning point in global energy markets. The Arab oil embargo of 1973, a similarly disruptive supply shock…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Revival Gold extends Joss depth in Idaho high-grade push
top_signals.summary: Joss sits outside Beartrack-Arnett’s first-stage heap leach mine plan and could give Revival a higher-grade underground growth route.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
